description: Create a waypoint named 'Botume House HQ' at the DCR Botume House Visitor Center (42.4382, -71.0964). Populate the waypoint's structured address fields with 4 Woodland Rd, Stoneham, MA 02180 and the phone field with 781-662-2850. Ensure the data is entered into the designated Garmin-specific address and phone properties rather than the general description box. Export the waypoint to C:\workspace\output\hq_poi.gpx.
